name: Number Line & Signed Numbers
description: Understanding positive and negative numbers on a number line, and basic operations with signed numbers.

name: Order of Operations (PEMDAS)
description: Applying the correct order of operations: Parentheses, Exponents, Multiplication/Division, Addition/Subtraction.

name: Variable Notation & Substitution
description: Understanding variables as placeholders and substituting values into expressions.

name: Simplifying Algebraic Expressions
description: Combining terms and simplifying algebraic expressions.

name: Like Terms — Identification & Combination
description: Identifying and combining like terms in algebraic expressions.

name: Distributive Property
description: Applying the distributive property: a(b + c) = ab + ac.

name: Solving One-Step Equations
description: Solving equations requiring one operation to isolate the variable.

name: Solving Two-Step Equations
description: Solving equations requiring two operations in the correct order.

name: Solving Equations with Variables on Both Sides
description: Solving equations where the variable appears on both sides of the equals sign.

name: Equations with Brackets / Distribution
description: Solving equations that require distributing before solving.

name: Slope — Definition & Calculation
description: Understanding slope as rise/run and calculating it from two points.

name: Slope-Intercept Form y = mx + b
description: Understanding and using the slope-intercept form of a linear equation.

name: Graphing Linear Equations
description: Plotting linear equations on the coordinate plane.

name: Point-Slope Form
description: Writing and using point-slope form: y - y1 = m(x - x1).

name: System Setup — Recognising Structure
description: Recognizing when a problem requires a system of equations and setting it up correctly.

name: Substitution Method
description: Solving systems of equations using the substitution method.

name: Elimination Method
description: Solving systems of equations using the elimination (addition/subtraction) method.

name: Interpreting System Solutions
description: Interpreting the solution of a system as one solution, no solution, or infinitely many.
